_meta.notes: No kc.savedShips yet — widget shows awaiting-telemetry placeholder. career.funds intentionally absent (short-circuits before subtitle). The legacy kc.*/v.* keys below drive snapshots.test.tsx via emitLegacyFixture; the `_stream` block drives the probe render harness (widgetRenderHarness/probe-entry) since LaunchDirector now reads stream topics (spaceCenter.state/scene, vessel.state, career.status, crash.*) rather than the legacy `data` keys. The two blocks are the SAME translation — keep them in sync with emitLegacyFixture.
